data.name: Aisling and the Tavern of Elves
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲


“Aisling and the Tavern of Elves” is an Isekai Fantasy-Comedy Dating Sim Visual Novel, where you play as Aisling Whitehorse, a hapless mercenary turned tavern owner eking out a living in the Elven Kingdom of Eiredagh.





- A charming and hilarious storyline in a High Fantasy setting.
- Beautiful anime-style character art
- Orchestral and folk music soundtrack
- Multiple endings

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® Vista / 7 / 8/ 8.1/ 10
  • 處理器: 1.5Ghz Processor or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1.5GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
